name: agentvillage
description: Edge Esmeralda 2026 — popup knowledge, EdgeOS calendar & directory, Geo knowledge graph access, and Index Network discovery skills for the Agent Village.

indexApiKey.title: Index Network API Key
indexApiKey.description: API key for Index Network. Obtain one at https://agent-ee26.edgecity.live/ or from your community admin.

edgeosToken.title: EdgeOS Bearer Token
edgeosToken.description: Human session JWT for Geo knowledge graph access, content writes, EdgeOS directory, and own profile.

edgeosApiKey.title: EdgeOS API Key
edgeosApiKey.description: Long-lived eos_live_... key for EdgeOS events and RSVPs.

villageApiBaseUrl.title: Village Pulse API Base URL
villageApiBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the one+1 Village API (e.g. https://api.getoneplusone.com). Required for Village Pulse, post-event check-ins, and Ask the Village.

villageHumanId.title: Village Human ID
villageHumanId.description: Identifier for this resident in the Village API (e.g. their Edge username or a UUID). Pre-filled by your community admin.

villageKey.title: Village Key (optional)
villageKey.description: Optional shared secret for deployments that enable the X-Village-Key header. Leave blank if your admin hasn't provided one.
